name: shopops-mcp
description: AI e-commerce operations manager for Shopify and WooCommerce. Moving-average demand forecasting with safety stock, margin-based pricing optimization, RFM 7-segment customer analysis, fraud/anomaly detection, ABC product performance, automated daily/weekly reports. 12 tools, 4 resources, 3 prompts.

tools.name: store_connect
tools.description: Connect Shopify (Admin API token) or WooCommerce (consumer key + secret)

tools.name: inventory_status
tools.description: Current stock levels, low-stock alerts, back-order flags

tools.name: inventory_forecast
tools.description: Moving-average demand projection with safety-stock buffer

tools.name: pricing_analyze
tools.description: Price elasticity report, under/over-priced SKU detection

tools.name: pricing_optimize
tools.description: Price suggestions based on margin, sales velocity, configurable rules

tools.name: customers_segment
tools.description: RFM analysis assigning 7 segments (Champions, Loyal, At Risk, etc.)

tools.name: customers_churn
tools.description: Churn risk scoring with retention recommendations

tools.name: product_performance
tools.description: ABC/Pareto analysis with contribution metrics per class

tools.name: report_weekly
tools.description: Weekly performance report with trend visualisation data

tools.name: store_sync
tools.description: Refresh inventory, orders, customers from connected store

resources.description: Sales, orders, customers, gross margin high-level metrics
Full catalogue with quantity-on-hand, reserved, forecasted shortages
100 most recent orders with status, total, payment method
Top 50 customers by LTV, frequency, recency
